docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,148.39 FILED BY SF AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER INC AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE INC A CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE INC A CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE INC A CORPORATION $2,148.39 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,163.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE INC A CORPORATION
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,205.27 AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE INC A CORPORATION
